task_completion.description: Create a custom Coordinate System in GMAT with Origin = Sun and Axes = MJ2000Ec.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GMAT GUI Coordinate System properties, or in the saved script file, verify a CoordinateSystem is defined with Origin set to 'Sun' and Axes set to 'MJ2000Ec'.

task_completion.description: Set the orbital state for each spacecraft using Mean Anomaly (MA).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GMAT Spacecraft properties dialog (Orbit tab), the anomaly type should be set to 'MA' (Mean Anomaly), or the script should show 'MA' being assigned instead of 'TA'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Force Model to use ONLY the Sun as a Point Mass.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GMAT Force Model properties, 'Sun' should be the only body in the Point Masses list (Earth, drag, SRP disabled), or the script should show 'PointMasses = {Sun}'.

task_completion.description: Propagate all three spacecraft for exactly 365 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GMAT Propagate command properties, the stopping condition should be set to ElapsedDays = 365, or the script should show a stopping condition of 365 days.
A file manager or terminal window showing the file 'lisa_formation.script' exists in the '~/GMAT_output/' directory.

task_completion.description: Write a summary report to ~/GMAT_output/lisa_stability_summary.txt with the required lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'lisa_stability_summary.txt' containing exactly the lines: 'nominal_arm_length_km:', 'max_arm_length_km:', 'min_arm_length_km:', and 'variation_km:' with corresponding numerical values.

integrity.description: The agent actually used GMAT to run the simulation and calculate the distances.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GMAT GUI open, a GMAT run executing, or terminal output showing GMAT running the script, rather than just a text editor with manually typed answers.

integrity.description: The saved GMAT script contains actual GMAT syntax for 3 spacecraft.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the script is visible, it should contain valid GMAT object definitions (e.g., 'Create Spacecraft', 'Create Propagator') for three distinct spacecraft, not just dummy text.

integrity.description: The summary report contains calculated numerical values, not placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in lisa_stability_summary.txt should be actual numbers (e.g., around 2500000 for nominal arm length), not '<value>' or blank.
